Ancient defender. I spend hours in a lane last-hitting creeps and denying my own team's resources just to prevent the enemy from getting them. Very prone to yelling in voice chat.
Anti-terrorist operative. I specialize in holding corners with an AWP, defusing bombs at the absolute last second, and asking for someone to 'drop A V P'. Rush B, do not stop.
Mercenary for hire. Excellent at pushing payload carts, capturing briefcases, and wearing extremely elaborate hats. I occasionally throw jars of questionable yellow liquid at my enemies.
Battle royale survivor. Parachuting out of a cargo plane armed with nothing, I excel at hiding in bathrooms with a frying pan for 20 minutes to secure a chicken dinner.
Pirate legend. Very good at playing the hurdy-gurdy while my ship sinks, eating bananas with the peel on, and locking my crewmates in the brig for no reason.
Space ninja. I parkour through enemy ships at blinding speeds, heavily armed with futuristic bows and giant swords, constantly grinding for materials to build slightly shinier space suits.
Hunter of beasts. I wander the gothic streets of Yharnam, dodging incredibly aggressive monsters and cosmic horrors. My main weapon transforms into a longer weapon. Fear the old blood.
Shinobi with a prosthetic arm. Exceptional at deflecting giant swords with a much smaller sword. Highly experienced in reviving from the dead immediately after being killed. Hesitation is defeat.
Jellybean athlete. I stumble through massive, chaotic obstacle courses, trying not to be eliminated by giant spinning hammers. Prone to grabbing other competitors and throwing them into the slime.
Insectoid vessel. Armed with a nail. I explore a vast, ruined underground kingdom of bugs. I do not speak, but I am very good at pogo-jumping on spikes.
Anthropomorphic beverage container. Made a terrible deal with the devil at a casino. I spend my time shooting projectiles from my fingers while dodging incredibly difficult 1930s cartoon bosses.
Rebellious prince of the underworld. I continuously try to escape my father's realm, dying and returning to the start every time. Excellent relationship with my adopted family of Greek gods.
Mountain climber. Dealing with heavy anxiety while performing incredibly precise mid-air dashes to collect strawberries. Occasionally chased by a very negative, purple version of myself.
Glowing spirit creature. Moving fluidly through a beautiful, dying forest to restore its light. Known for making players cry within the first ten minutes.
World warrior. Master of the 'Hadouken' and 'Shoryuken'. I travel the globe fighting martial artists in front of highly enthusiastic crowds and destroying cars with my bare hands.
